records.sell_through_notes: Strong stream anchor. Guaranteed-hit style appeal drives consistent sales.
records.audience_response: Very positive. Viewers like the guaranteed-hit format.

records.sell_through_notes: Can sell quickly but often carry higher buy-price risk. Margins can be tight if buy price is too high.
records.margin_notes: Higher buy-price risk means margins need careful management. Low-AOV flat-fee risk on Whatnot is a concern especially around £1–£2 hammer prices.
records.source: Known SaveRoom context — general business knowledge

records.margin_notes: More predictable than English. Good staple product.

records.sell_through_notes: Performing better than originally expected. Now a useful staple.

records.sell_through_notes: Experimental. Can be useful if priced correctly.
records.audience_response: Mixed. Some buyers are curious, others prefer other languages.
records.margin_notes: Pricing is key. Too high and they don't move. Too low and margin disappears.
records.source: Known SaveRoom context — general business knowledge
